basic_details.job_title: NISER Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NISER Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 20-05-2026. Age relaxation to entitled categories as per ISRO rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Physics/Applied Physics/Astrophysics/Astronomy/Space Sciences/Atmospheric Science/Climate Science/Engineering Physics, M.Tech/M.E in Engineering Disciplines
qualification.details: Master's degree in Physics/Applied Physics/Astrophysics/Astronomy/Space Sciences/Atmospheric Science/Climate Science/Engineering Physics or M.Tech/M.E in Engineering Disciplines. Desirable: Strong Programming and Computational Knowledge.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISER Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Physics, Applied Physics, Astrophysics, Astronomy, Space Sciences, Atmospheric Science, Climate Science, Engineering Physics, or an M.Tech/M.E in Engineering Disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years as of 20th May 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible categories as per ISRO rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate-I position at NISER Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Institute of Science Education and Research located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER) is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NISER / R&D-251 / EPS2601 / 06 / 2026-27.
